ꉂ`𖦹.The smell of liquor mingles with the striking sight of crimson red walls, doodles and a ceiling strangely decorated with chandeliers, leaving not a single space for any person who dares to fly through the ceiling heights. Individuals of dubious repute often frequent this place, though it is unclear whether they do so for leisure or other interests. Nevertheless, one is invited to enter, since, despite its peculiar character, the premises attracts visitors with its unconventional atmosphere, characterized by the presence of harlequins and poker cards.

「 ✦&(᨟ ͜● ᨟)& ✦ 」

⋆✴︎🃜🃚🃖🃁🂭🂺 ̊。⋆〃✦ ┆ᴘʟᴇᴀsᴇ ᴅɪʀᴇᴄᴛ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴀᴛᴛᴇɴᴛɪᴏɴ ᴛᴏ ᴛʜᴇ ғɪɢᴜʀᴇ ᴏғ ᴛʜᴇ ᴊᴇsᴛᴇʀ ᴘᴏsɪᴛɪᴏɴᴇᴅ ʙᴇғᴏʀᴇ ᴀ ᴛᴀʙʟᴇ, ᴍᴇᴛɪᴄᴜʟᴏᴜsʟʏ ʜᴀɴᴅʟɪɴɢ ᴄᴀʀᴅs ᴡʜɪʟᴇ ʜɪs ᴇʏᴇs ʀᴇᴠᴇᴀʟ ᴀ ᴅᴇᴠɪʟɪsʜ ɢʟɪɴᴛ ᴀɴᴅ ʜɪs sᴍɪʟᴇ sᴘᴇᴀᴋs ᴏғ ᴀ ᴘʟᴀʏғᴜʟ ᴍɪsᴄʜɪᴇғ.

✦•┈๑⋅⋯ ⋯⋅๑┈•✦
